title: State Contract v1
description: Schema for per-node state files passed between DAG nodes. Each node receives an input state, writes an output state, and may produce artifacts.

dag_id.description: Unique identifier for the DAG execution instance

phase.description: Execution phase — one of: pending, running, completed, failed, skipped

node_id.description: Identifier for this DAG node (must match a node in the DAG definition)

input.description: Input data passed to this node from upstream nodes or the initial trigger

task.description: The task or prompt for this node to execute

context.description: Additional context data (files, references, prior results)

artifacts.description: Paths to input artifacts from upstream nodes

output.description: Output data produced by this node for downstream consumers

summary.description: Natural language summary of what this node produced

artifacts.description: Paths to artifacts produced by this node

files_changed.description: File paths modified by this node's execution

decisions.description: Key decisions made during this node's execution

metadata.description: Execution metadata for observability and debugging

temperature.description: Temperature setting used for this node

node_version.description: Version of the node logic that processed this state
